   <h1>

   <h3>
   This is a personal project that I'm using to learn and relearn HTML5 and CSS!
   </h3>
   <h3>
   Basic info:
   </h3>
   <h4>
   16 years old <br>
   I live in Mideast USA, my timezone is EST (GMT-5) <br>
   Panro/Demisex/Polyam - Taken tho <br>
   Mildly proficient in HTML5, CSS, JS, Python 3 (not really tho)<br>
   Just a transgirl learning to code stuff and be silly :3 <br>
   </h4>
   <h3>
   Interests:
   </h3>
   <h4>
   -Favorite genre of media: Horror/disturbing/unsettling content in general <br>
   -Favorite creators: Markiplier, AstralSpiff, Wendigoon, Failboat, Soundsmith, Skurry, Shayy <br>
   -Games I'm (somewhat) active in: Lethal Company, Deep Rock Galactic, Team Fortress 2, Undertale/Deltarune/Fangames, Terraria/TModLoader, Celeste, Rivals of Aether, Pokemon fangames, Dragon Ball FighterZ, Guilty Gear Strive, Phasmophobia, Hollow Knight, <br>
